idea-plugin.name: ApproveJ
idea-plugin.description:
IntelliJ IDEA integration for ApproveJ approval testing.
  • Gutter icons next to ApproveJ test methods for quick execution.
  • Side-by-side diff viewer triggered directly from test failure output.
  • One-click "Approve" button to overwrite the approved file with the actual file.

action.description: Overwrite the approved file with the actual file
